settings.text: Our business analysis will give you a clear understanding of your RTO’s performance. This includes understanding the current structure, operations, and performance of the RTO, as well as the markets and competition that you are operating in, a comprehensive review of the training delivery and a review of the quality assurance processes. This information will be compiled in reports that will give you a thorough understanding of the health, welfare and potential of your RTO.

Our business analysis includes an evaluation of the marketing, financial and legal aspects of the RTO. This includes reviewing the financial performance, cash flow and legal compliance. We will assess the marketing strategy, so that you can understand how effective your messaging is and identify areas of improvement. With these insights, you can make informed decisions that will enable your RTO to run at its absolute best.

We will analyse the customer service and feedback systems in place, review customer feedback and customer service processes, to give you an understanding of how customers perceive your services and how to improve their experience.

The analysis looks into your data collection and management systems, as well as your communication strategies between stakeholders. This can help you to identify any weaknesses in communication and identify areas of improvement.

In addition to reviewing your RTO's business processes, we also examine your human resources and resource management. This includes reviewing the processes in place for recruitment and retention, as well as the learning and development strategies. With these insights, you can ensure that you have the right people in place to support your operations and that they are provided with the best possible learning and development opportunities
Are you running a registered training Organisation (RTO)?
settings.content: If so, then you know that it is important to stay on top of your business operations. The process of business analysis can help you to identify areas of improvement and make sure that you are staying ahead of the competition. CAQA offers a comprehensive business analysis of your RTO that can help you to do just that.
settings.bottom_text: The analysis will give you insight into:
settings.bottom_content:
• Identification of current strengths and weaknesses.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s customer experience.
  • Analysis of the current RTO’s marketing and promotional activities.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s financial performance.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s operations.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s compliance with applicable regulations.
  • Analysis of the RTO’s workforce and its efficiency.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s use of technology.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s risk management processes.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s governance and leadership.
  • Analysis of the RTO’s learner and student engagement.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s sales and customer service.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s stakeholder management.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s revenue streams.
  • Analysis of the RTO’s resources.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s training and assessment processes.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s choice and use of learning technology.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s strategies for quality assurance and improvement.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s strategies for sustainability.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s strategies for growth.
  • Evaluation of your organisation's objectives and strategies.
  • Review of current policies and procedures.
  • Identification of gaps in the system and processes.
  • Assessment of the RTO's compliance requirements.
  • Evaluation of the RTO’s staff performance.
  • Analysis of market trends and customer demands.
  • Analysis of current and potential competitors.
  • Analysis of the RTO’s communication systems.
  • Assessment of the RTO’s overall performance.
  • Identification of any potential opportunities.

settings.text: Finally, our business analysis also looks into the governance and management of your RTO. This includes understanding the current structure of the organisation, as well as the risk management framework. With these insights, you can understand the effectiveness of the governance and management in place, and ensure that you are running a secure and compliant organisation.

settings.content: By working with CAQA, you can gain a comprehensive understanding of the performance of your RTO. Our analysis will provide you with the insights that you need to make informed decisions and ensure that you are running a successful and compliant organisation.
